description:
Features:
Help young children develop fine motor skills, manually coordinate their eyes, and solve problems
Put your baby on the cylindrical socket to understand the difference in size, length and thickness.
Sustainable wood made with environmentally friendly non-toxic paint materials, without dangerous sharp edges.
Exercise children's vision and brain power
Help cultivate interest and develop intelligence.
Promote feeling, emotion, hearing, hand-eye coordination.
Interaction between parents and children, interactive toys

description:
Train your child's coordination skills and have fun at home.
This will be the perfect gift or reward for your child.
Age of children 2 years and older.

specification:
Material: wood
